generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensorInterior1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring interior temperature inside styrofoam container, accuracy ±0.5°C between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureSensorInterior2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring interior temperature inside styrofoam container, accuracy ±0.5°C between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureSensorExterior : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring exterior temperature outside styrofoam container, accuracy ±0.5°C between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorInterior1, TemperatureSensorInterior2, TemperatureSensorExterior
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors used for model calibration and prediction"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamics model with uniform air temperature and no heatbed heat accumulation; parameters: C_air (air heat capacity), G_box (thermal conductance of box)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4ModelBEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamics model accounting for heatbed thermal inertia; parameters: C_heater (heater heat capacity), C_air (air heat capacity), G_heater (heater thermal conductance), G_box (box thermal conductance)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4ModelBEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical sensors and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B software environment for model execution and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService, MonitoringService
]

instance ScipyOptimizationLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance PCBControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control and signal decoupling in heatbed/fan actuation"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction using calibrated thermal dynamics models (Model A and B)"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for model parameter optimization via non-linear least squares"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParametersUpdatedInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring services for safety violations and operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationDetectedInsight, SafetyAction, HeatbedAdjustment, FanAdjustment
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from thermal model execution"
]

instance ModelParametersUpdatedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated model parameters based on experimental calibration data"
]

instance SafetyViolationDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation detected by monitoring service (e.g., overheating)"
]

instance SafetyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic safety action (e.g., power off) upon safety violation detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HeatbedAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of heatbed temperature for operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FanAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of fan speed for operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system management"
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control and signal decoupling"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214 × 214 × 3 mm) actuated via Raspberry Pi GPIO through MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow actuated via Raspberry Pi GPIO through MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system environment"
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, PowerSupply, RaspberryPi4ModelB, PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers, Heatbed, Fan, TemperatureSensorInterior1, TemperatureSensorInterior2, TemperatureSensorExterior
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for heatbed and fan are transmitted from the controller to the low-level driver via RabbitMQ, which then activates MOSFETs to regulate hardware actuators based on digital twin decisions."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server hosted on Raspberry Pi, low-level driver, controller, and simulation models; data flows from physical sensors to RabbitMQ, processed by DT components for monitoring, calibration, and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B validated for superior thermal inertia prediction through experimental comparison; uniform temperature tests confirmed sensor placement and fan speed impact on temperature distribution, with maximum discrepancy of 6°C at 18V fan voltage."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ protocol for communication between physical twin components and digital twin, with RabbitMQ server running on Raspberry Pi for message brokering."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hosts RabbitMQ server, low-level driver, controller, and simulation models for all digital twin components."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety during operation, ensuring controlled actuation of heatbed and fan to prevent hazardous conditions."
]
